_comment: Stage-0 deterministic gates from auto-work-harness, wired for gam. Hook commands resolve the harness through ${AWH_HOME:-$HOME/Projects/auto-work-harness}, so no machine-specific absolute path is hardcoded; set AWH_HOME to override (after CyberOS absorption, point it at the vendored tools/awh). The PreToolUse hook auto-discovers gam/.awh/policy.json; the Stop hook auto-discovers gam/.awh/gate.sh. Exit code 2 from a hook blocks the action and returns stderr to the model. (PostToolUse Python formatter is omitted — gam is TypeScript; add a prettier/eslint --fix hook if you want auto-format.)
